description: Insight Timer is a meditation and wellness platform offering guided meditations, sleep content, yoga, and related wellbeing features. The `insighttimer-api.net` domain appears to host service infrastructure endpoints associated with Insight Timer.
summary: Insight Timer exposes a known public MCP server at `https://chatgpt-api.insighttimer-api.net/mcp`; no public developer HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found for `insighttimer-api.net`.
